endpoints.name: Find anomalies for the entire series in batch.
endpoints.description: The operation will generate a model using the entire series, each point will be detected with the same model. In this method, points before and after a certain point will be used to determine whether it's an anomaly. The entire detection can give user an overall status of the time series.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Detect anomaly status of the latest point in time series.
endpoints.description: The operation will generate a model using points before the latest one, In this method, only history points are used for determine whether the target point is an anomaly. Latest point detecting matches the scenario of real-time monitoring of business metrics.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_API_KEY}} with your AZURE API KEY.
